title: Handwritten Battery Voltage Log
description: A column of voltage readings in Ida Broussard's handwriting on the back of a triage sheet, recorded at irregular intervals over the past six hours. The readings show a consistent 3% drop per minute of sustained transmission and a 0.5% passive drain per hour of standby. The most recent reading, taken eleven minutes ago, was 22%. The log includes a small notation in the margin: 'next window 11 min — burst only — DO NOT run full text.' This is Ida's own pre-crisis planning, written before the coordinate error was discovered.
